narrative:
Precinct Toledo 5J (precinct in Lucas County) has 919 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.4 percentage points.
